denny.name: Denny
denny.description: Bright orange-red baby crab in a tiny explorer outfit, curious and cheerful, small claws, big expressive eyes
denny.image_prompt: One cute cartoon baby crab wearing a tiny khaki explorer vest and a small safari hat, orange-red color, two small symmetrical claws, big happy eyes, standing on a mossy forest floor, soft watercolor painting style, white background, centered, no other characters, no writing, no text, no letters, children's book illustration style

maya.name: Maya
maya.description: Tiny brown field mouse in a red polka-dot dress, shy but warm, round ears, bright curious eyes
maya.image_prompt: One single cute cartoon tiny field mouse wearing a red polka-dot dress, soft brown fur, big round ears, bright curious eyes, sweet shy smile, standing upright, white background, soft watercolor painting style, children's book illustration style, no text, no writing, ONLY ONE character
